---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Atazanavir (As Sulfate) 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Atazanavir (As Sulfate)</strong> 目前有 <strong>24 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Atazanavir (As Sulfate) 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Reyataz capsules, co-administered with low dose ritonavir, are indicated for the treatment of HIV-1 infected adults and paediatric patients 6 years of age and older in combination with other...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L1</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>HIV infectious disease（100.0%）</li>
<li>feline acquired immunodeficiency syndrome（100.0%）</li>
<li>simian immunodeficiency virus infection（100.0%）</li>
<li>neurodevelopmental disorder with ataxic gait, absent speech, and decreased cortical white matter（100.0%）</li>
<li>AIDS（99.9%）</li>
<li>obsolete familial combined hyperlipidemia（99.8%）</li>
<li>congenital human immunodeficiency virus（99.7%）</li>
<li>AIDS related complex（99.7%）</li>
<li>fibroma of prostate（98.8%）</li>
<li>Brenner tumor（98.7%）</li>
<li>benign reproductive system neoplasm（98.7%）</li>
<li>benign prostate phyllodes tumor（98.5%）</li>
<li>male reproductive organ cancer（98.3%）</li>
<li>prostate cancer/brain cancer susceptibility（98.1%）</li>
<li>prostate leiomyoma（98.0%）</li>
<li>homozygous familial hypercholesterolemia（97.0%）</li>
<li>breast fibrocystic disease（96.4%）</li>
<li>chronic hepatitis C virus infection（95.9%）</li>
<li>hypercholesterolemia, autosomal dominant（95.9%）</li>
<li>apocrine adenosis of breast（95.4%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/atazanavir-as-sulfate/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
